arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Tottenham's players wore ODD socks in training ahead of Thursday's crucial Europa League clash against AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: Tottenham were outperformed throughout the entire game, which concluded with Lucas Bergvall's comical goal in the 18th minute following a corner kick taken by Teun Koopmeiners.

arts.ttl: Guglielmo Vicario explains why Tottenham players remain fully remain behind Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Vicario backs under-pressure Spurs head coach ahead of crunch Europa League clash with AZ Alkmaar

arts.ttl: Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs AZ with Danso out, Van de Ven and Tel start
arts.sum: Gold's team: Vicario; Spence, Romero, Van de Ven, Udogie; Bergvall, Bissouma, Maddison; Tel, Solanke, Son. Guest's team: Vicario; Porro, Romero, Van de Ven, Spence; Bergvall, Sarr, Maddison; Tel, Solanke, Son.

arts.ttl: No extra pressure – Ange Postecoglou relaxed before crunch clash with AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: Tottenham’s season rests on Europa League progress after a difficult winter saw them slip to 13th in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs 'open talks' over move for Man United-linked midfielder
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly hold talks with representatives of Lille midfielder Angel Gomes, who is attracting interest from Manchester United and West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Attacker out ‘for weeks’ after unfortunate tackle from Tottenham’s Lucas Bergvall
arts.sum: AZ Alkmaar’s Mayckel Lahdo is set to be absent ‘for weeks’ after an unfortunate challenge from Tottenham Hotspur’s Lucas Bergvall. That’s according to Voetbal Nieuws, who cover the player today as he’s set to be on the sidelines for a while. They explain that AZ will have to do without Lahdo for the coming weeks The post Attacker out ‘for weeks’ after unfortunate tackle from Tottenham’s Lucas Bergvall appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou can reunite dream Tottenham pairing against AZ Alkmaar as Kevin Danso injury confirmed
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou confirms that Kevin Danso suffered a hamstring injury in the weekend's 2-2 Premier League draw with Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou unhappy with Spurs sack questions
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou refused to comment on whether his Tottenham tenure would be at risk if the club fail to overcome AZ Alkmaar in the Europa League tomorrow evening. Spurs face the Dutch side needing to overturn a 1-0 deficit from the first leg. The club’s hopes of a successful season are pinned on the Europa […] The post Ange Postecoglou unhappy with Spurs sack questions first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs AZ Alkmaar: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for Europa League
arts.sum: Spurs need to turn things around after first leg defeat but have been boosted by recent returns

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou gives Kevin Danso injury update and reveals returning player for Tottenham vs AZ
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has confirmed that Kevin Danso will play no part for Tottenham in Thursday's Europa League round of 16 second leg tie against AZ Alkmaar because of a hamstring injury. "Kevin got a hamstring injury in the last game so he's out," said Postecoglou.
